completed_tasks.title: Add Coverage Script Configuration

completed_tasks.title: Verify ESLint Detection by Quality System
completed_tasks.description: The quality system reports "No ESLint configuration found" but we have working ESLint configs. Investigate why detection is failing.

Strike 2 quality score improves from 70% to 100%
Linting works across all packages without detection issues
